chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3857 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 3, 6, 7 & 8. 2) For hearing of CMA No.15767/2025. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 13.08.2025. M/s. Nabeel Kolachi and Muhammad Ilyas Ahmed, Advocates for Petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, AAG, Sindh. M/s. Dhani Bux Lashari, Tassaduq Nadeem and Rafiq Bhanbhro, Advocates for SBCA along with Muhammad Asim Ansari, Director SBCA, Malir. ________________ Learned counsel for SBCA has filed comments, which are taken on record. Petitioner is purportedly owner of a Plot No.278/2 with construction plan consisting ground + 2 floors. The grievance of the petitioner is that he has submitted a revised building plan but it is not being decided by Sindh Building Control Authority. Counsel for SBCA is present and submits that in fifteen days’ time a decision on the revised plan submitted by the petitioner would be made. Petitioner’s counsel is satisfied. Accordingly, petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, till fifteen days petitioner will not raise any construction over the plot. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
